summary: This page introduces time shifting of signals through Example 1.3, showing how an exponential signal is delayed and advanced by 1 second. It gives both graphical illustrations and piecewise mathematical descriptions for the original, delayed, and advanced signals using substitutions t -> t-1 and t -> t+1. The page also includes an exercise on delaying another signal by 2 seconds.

figures.caption: Fig. 1.9 (a) signal f(t) (b) f(t) delayed by 1 second (c) f(t) advanced by 1 second.
